across.clue: Haste is speed in movement or action.
To make a surface look better with small improvements. | ___ up
To decrease something is to make it less than it was before.
To choose one person from a group for special attention. | ___ out
If something is comparative, it is being judged based on something else.
To misplace something means to lose it.
money that a court orders you to pay someone because you have harmed them or their property.
To admonish someone is to tell them you disapprove of their behavior.

down.clue: Contribute articles to a publication | ___ for a magazine/etc.
To abuse means to hurt someone or something on purpose.
A formal thing is official or serious.
relating to an area or town near a large city but away from its centre where there are many houses especially for middle-class people.
When someone is immune to a disease, they cannot be affected by it.
A Christian is a person who believes in Jesus Christ.
If someone is hospitable, they are friendly to strangers.
An ambassador is a government worker who works in another country.
When something is adjacent, it is next to or adjoining something else.

Glory is the importance, magnificence, or specialness of something.
